title: claytonia multiscapa subsp. czukczorum
intro: Claytonia multiscapa subsp. czukczorum is a subspecies of the Claytonia multiscapa plant, also known as the Chukchi winter purslane, a succulent perennial plant that belongs to the family Portulacaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Claytonia multiscapa subsp. czukczorum include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
